headline: 暑期档预热：新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up: New Films Ready to Launch
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：痴迷领跑热搜，无职转生等新片备受期待，玩具总动员5热度不减，暑期档大战一触即发。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: 'Obsession' tops trending, new titles like 'Mushoku Tensei' generate buzz, 'Toy Story 5' remains hot, summer movie season approaches.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，本周仅1部新片。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, only 1 new movie this week.

industryHighlights.text: 痴迷连续多日占据热搜榜首。
安昂传奇、蜘蛛侠崭新之日等大片即将上映。
industryHighlights.en: Blockbusters like 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' coming soon.
